overview: A production-grade news-driven trading decision system that consumes analyzed news from an external endpoint and converts it into structured trade decisions. Supports 4 analysis modes: Technical, Event-Based, Fundamental, and Hybrid God Mode, with full decision explainability and risk management.
features: News consumption from external endpoint with deduplication
Dashboard with live stats and system health
Configurable risk engine and system settings
Mock data for all entities with easy live-endpoint switch
Pre-market batch and live polling modes
Phase-ready architecture for event, technical, decision, and journal engines
